accountBoundaryNote: Mdtero Account is the control plane for API keys, quota, history, diagnostics, and install prompts. The current public CLI ships through mdtero-install on npm as the unified runtime entry for discovery, parse, translate, task-status, download, and agent-skill workflows.

targets.label: OpenClaw
targets.description: OpenClaw stays on a separate ClawHub route; confirm that route in your OpenClaw environment before relying on it. Normal parsing still uses Mdtero's CLI/API and backend parser; use the extension or dashboard when the user must upload a local paper file.
targets.descriptionZh: OpenClaw 保持独立的 ClawHub 路线；请先在你的 OpenClaw 环境里确认该路线可用。常规解析仍走 Mdtero CLI/API 和后端解析；需要上传本地论文文件时再使用扩展或网页端上传。

targets.label: Claude Code
targets.description: Best for workspaces that keep Mdtero in .claude/skills.
targets.descriptionZh: 适合把 Mdtero 放进 .claude/skills 的 Claude Code 工作区。

targets.label: Codex
targets.description: Best for workspaces that keep Mdtero in .codex/skills.
targets.descriptionZh: 适合把 Mdtero 放进 .codex/skills 的 Codex 工作区。

targets.label: Gemini CLI
targets.description: Best for Gemini CLI setups that keep the workflow in GEMINI.md.
targets.descriptionZh: 适合把工作流写进 GEMINI.md 的 Gemini CLI 环境。

targets.label: Hermes Agent
targets.description: Best for Hermes Agent setups that load SKILL.md workflows from ~/.hermes/skills.
targets.descriptionZh: 适合从 ~/.hermes/skills 加载 SKILL.md 工作流的 Hermes Agent 环境。
targets.mcpNote: Hermes supports MCP through ~/.hermes/config.yaml, but Mdtero's public MCP installer flow is not active yet. Use the Mdtero skill first; add MCP only when a maintained Mdtero MCP server is published.

targets.label: OpenCode
targets.description: Best for OpenCode workspaces that keep project skills in .opencode/skills.
targets.descriptionZh: 适合把项目技能放进 .opencode/skills 的 OpenCode 工作区。

boundaries.desktopPublicationMode: deferred public preview archive with GitHub Release asset download fallback; not part of the current extension-and-CLI launchability proof
